scripts.test: node --test tests/url-api.test.mjs && rm -rf .test-dist && (tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json || true) && mkdir -p .test-dist/node_modules && ln -sfn .. .test-dist/node_modules/@ && test -f .test-dist/tests/google-routing.test.js && node --test .test-dist/tests/google-routing.test.js .test-dist/tests/chat-video-routing.test.js .test-dist/tests/policy-engine.test.js .test-dist/tests/persistence-store.test.js .test-dist/tests/chat-panel-guard.test.js .test-dist/tests/inflight-guards.test.js .test-dist/tests/starter-chat-idempotency.test.js .test-dist/tests/reasoning-stream.test.js .test-dist/tests/reasoning-ui-state.test.js .test-dist/tests/video-ingestion.test.js .test-dist/tests/long-term-editor.test.js .test-dist/tests/model-registry.test.js .test-dist/tests/retrieval-service.test.js
